name: ulises
description: Connect Codex to a scoped Ulises instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped Ulises tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to Ulises through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so Ulises Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Ulises only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
